title: Quartz Useful
description:
Adds Quartz Tools And Armor To The Game
Quartz Tools Are A Little Bit Better Than Gold
Armor Is Between Diamond And Netherite
(Quartz Sword is Made With Blaze Rod Instead Of Sticks)
body:
Adds Quartz Tools And Armor
Quartz Armor Is Between Diamond And Netherite
Quartz Tools Are Little Bit Better Than Gold Tools
Sword Is Made With Blaze Rod Instead Of Stick
You Must Smelt Nether Quartz To Make Quartz Ingot
